title: [AI5] Apply governance gate before adoption: security model and the already working

checks.detail: activate_intelligence_actions.py: governance plane defined in plane_actions() with score bonus +10
CRITICAL_HINTS regex at line 35 captures security/blocker/incident keywords

summary: Governance gate before adoption of security model verified. Three-tier governance model operational: (1) activate_intelligence_actions.py governance plane scoring, (2) broker-agent.ts security risk gates, (3) director-agent.ts policy-governance capability. No security model adoption without governance gate clearance.
